instructions: Fill in the values below. Once complete, all [placeholders] in the scripts (EN + ES, B2B + Birthday) will be replaced.

base_rate_percent.question: What is the standard partner commission rate per booking?

payout_frequency.question: How are commissions paid out — monthly or per booking?

avg_booking_price_low.question: What is the low end of average booking price per night?

avg_booking_price_high.question: What is the high end of average booking price per night?

typical_referral_earning.question: How much does an agency earn on a typical 2-night referral?

tier_threshold_referrals.question: How many referrals per quarter to qualify for the higher tier?

tier_higher_rate_percent.question: What is the higher-tier commission rate?

top_partner_annual_earning.question: How much do top agency partners earn annually from glamping referrals?

property_count.question: How many properties does Horizons Getaways operate?

specific_locations.question: Which specific locations in South Carolina can be named on a call?
specific_locations.example: Sand Hills, Lake Marion, Edisto River

per_call_fields_no_action_needed.note: These are filled by the manager before/during each call. No global replacement needed.
fields: [adventure travel / Southeast destinations / boutique experiences] — agency niche
